title: European defense stocks rally after Ukraine ratifies $105 billion EU loan deal; regional indices fall
summary_full: European stocks were broadly lower on Thursday as investors assessed news related to the Iran war and developments in Ukraine.
summary_public: European stocks were broadly lower on Thursday as investors assessed news related to the Iran war and developments in Ukraine.
